combined_summary: The three most critical, immediate actions are to define the linguistic rules and corpus, conduct a risk assessment, and develop pilot learning materials. Defining the linguistic rules is essential for establishing the foundation of Clear English, while the risk assessment will identify potential challenges that could derail the project. Developing pilot learning materials is crucial for testing the new standard and gathering feedback from users, ensuring that the project remains aligned with its goals.

feedback.title: Define Linguistic Rules and Corpus
feedback.description:
To initiate this project, you must: 
- Assemble a team of at least 5 linguists by 2026-02-15 to collaboratively define the rules for Clear English, focusing on ordinals, spelling-to-sound, and morphology. 
- Create a reference corpus of at least 10,000 sentences that exemplify the new rules by 2026-03-31. 
- Document the rationale for each rule in a structured format to ensure clarity and consistency by 2026-04-15.

feedback.title: Develop Pilot Learning Materials
feedback.description:
To initiate this project, you must: 
- Design and produce at least 500 pages of pilot learning materials, including textbooks and digital resources, by 2026-06-30. 
- Collaborate with 3 educational institutions to test these materials with at least 100 adult ESL learners by 2026-07-15. 
- Create assessment tools to evaluate comprehension and usability, ensuring they are ready for pilot testing by 2026-07-31.

feedback.title: Establish Governance Structure
feedback.description:
To initiate this project, you must: 
- Form an editorial board consisting of at least 7 members, including linguists, educators, and industry experts, by 2026-02-28. 
- Define the roles and responsibilities of each board member, ensuring clarity in decision-making processes by 2026-03-15. 
- Schedule quarterly meetings to review progress and make necessary adjustments to the project plan, starting from 2026-04-01.

feedback.title: Create Outreach and Engagement Plan
feedback.description:
To initiate this project, you must: 
- Identify and reach out to at least 10 potential academic partners and ESL publishers by 2026-02-20 to gauge interest in collaboration. 
- Develop a communication strategy that includes at least 3 outreach events (webinars, workshops) by 2026-05-15 to engage stakeholders and gather feedback. 
- Create a feedback mechanism to collect input from participants during these events, ensuring it is operational by 2026-06-01.

feedback.title: Conduct Risk Assessment
feedback.description:
To initiate this project, you must: 
- Develop a comprehensive risk register by 2026-02-10 that identifies at least 10 potential risks, including educator pushback and technical challenges. 
- Assign a risk owner for each identified risk and establish mitigation strategies by 2026-02-20. 
- Schedule a risk review meeting every month to assess the effectiveness of mitigation strategies and adjust as necessary, starting from 2026-03-01.

feedback.title: Implement Data Privacy Measures
feedback.description:
To initiate this project, you must: 
- Develop a data privacy policy that complies with relevant regulations (e.g., GDPR) by 2026-02-28, ensuring it addresses data collection, storage, and sharing practices. 
- Train all team members on data privacy protocols by 2026-03-15 to ensure compliance and understanding of the policy. 
- Establish a data breach response plan by 2026-03-31 that outlines steps to take in case of a data incident.

feedback.title: Engage with Regulatory Bodies
feedback.description:
To initiate this project, you must: 
- Identify at least 5 relevant regulatory bodies (e.g., ISO, W3C) and schedule introductory meetings by 2026-02-15 to discuss the Clear English initiative. 
- Prepare a presentation that outlines the goals and benefits of Clear English for these meetings by 2026-02-25. 
- Document feedback from these meetings and adjust project plans accordingly by 2026-03-10.

feedback.title: Establish Ethical Guidelines
feedback.description:
To initiate this project, you must: 
- Draft a set of ethical guidelines for the project by 2026-02-20 that addresses issues such as stakeholder engagement and data handling. 
- Review these guidelines with the editorial board and incorporate their feedback by 2026-03-01. 
- Publish the finalized ethical guidelines on the project website by 2026-03-15 to ensure transparency and accountability.
